title: Spiesia lagopus
taxonomy: Spiesia lagopus is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Spiesia lagopus is a legume and is closely related to other species within the Spiesia genus. The plant is further classified within the subfamily Faboideae and tribe Loteae. It is a perennial herb with small, yellow flowers.
